title: The Pittsburgh Bars Most Worth Following
subtitle: By the numbers, this quarter
angle: which Pittsburgh bars and breweries are leading the social conversation. Who's getting filmed, who's posting, who's getting talked about.
intro:
Pittsburgh's bar scene has always had strong opinions attached to it. What's changed is where those opinions land and how loudly they accumulate. This quarter's rankings measure the actual conversation: reviews, photos, video, and the staff accounts that shape all three.

Hidden Harbor leads the Pittsburgh bar rankings by a significant margin on reviews and photos, which makes its near-total absence from video that much more striking. The tiki bar in Squirrel Hill South has built genuine visual equity without a single viral clip to show for it. Hop Farm Brewing Company sits second, powered largely by review volume and a single active manager account, while TikTok has produced almost nothing for them. Golden Age Beer Company holds third on review depth alone, a real signal, but one that exists entirely without the video infrastructure that tends to accelerate it.

The pattern this quarter is bars earning credibility through text and photos while leaving video essentially untouched. That gap is the most interesting thing to watch heading into summer. Issue 02 will track whether any of these businesses close it, and which ones let it widen.

items.name: Hidden Harbor
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Bars On Reviews And Photos, Not Yet On Video.
items.playbook_top_move: Turn the bar into a Reels set. Hidden Harbor posted 12 times in 30 days but shot zero Reels; one drink-pour or atmosphere Reel per week would directly address the weakest signal on the board.

items.name: Hop Farm Brewing Company
items.descriptor: Second In Pittsburgh Bars, Built On Reviews And A Single Manager. TikTok Has Barely Noticed.

featured_tiktok.author: jseguritan23
featured_tiktok.caption:
Trivial Warfare Army Takeover 2026 in Pittsburgh, PA:
Main trivia event hosted by Liz Quesnelle’s Madcap Trivia at the Hop Farm Brewing Company 

#pubtrivia #triviaevent #triviatime #triviatok #pittsburgh

items.playbook_top_move: Make the space impossible to scroll past. With 364 photos already on Google, the gap is short-form video. The live edge tables, garage door, and pool room are three distinct visual environments that creators have not filmed yet.

items.name: Golden Age Beer Company
items.descriptor: Third In Pittsburgh Bars On Review Depth Alone, With No TikTok Presence To Build On It.
items.playbook_top_move: Get the food story on video. Reels of the shepherd pie pierogi special and the $10 liter pour are the two most repeatable, specific hooks in the current review record; start there.

items.name: Commerce Bar
items.descriptor: Second In Pittsburgh Bars On Review Depth Alone, The Social Signal Has Barely Shown Up.
items.playbook_top_move: Get the bar on Google completely. Add a website URL and phone number to the Google profile; right now both fields are blank, which stalls every potential first visit.
